zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean d'Armagnac II "the Hunchback"   Comte de Armagne, Fezenac, Rodez於1333年出生時，他的父親Jean d'Armagnac I22歲，母親Béatrice De Clermont Countess Of Charolais22歲。他於1359年11月4日與Jeanne de PÉRIGORD結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1384年5月26日在法國福朗-可特艾尤拉阿維尼享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean d'Armagnac II "the Hunchback"   Comte de Armagne, Fezenac, Rodez于1333年出生时，他的父亲Jean d'Armagnac I22岁，母亲Béatrice De Clermont Countess Of Charolais22岁。他于1359年11月4日与Jeanne de PÉRIGORD结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1384年5月26日在法国福朗-可特艾尤拉阿維尼享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean d'Armagnac II "the Hunchback"   Comte de Armagne, Fezenac, Rodez was born in 1333, his father, Jean d'Armagnac I, was 22 and his mother, Béatrice De Clermont Countess Of Charolais, was 22. He married Jeanne de PÉRIGORD on 4 November 1359. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 26 May 1384, in Avignon, Jura, Franche-Comté, France, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean d'Armagnac II "the Hunchback"   Comte de Armagne, Fezenac, Rodez est né en 1333, son père, Jean d'Armagnac I, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Béatrice De Clermont Countess Of Charolais, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de PÉRIGORD le 4 novembre 1359. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 26 mai 1384, à Avignon, Jura, Franche-Comté, France, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean d'Armagnac II "the Hunchback"   Comte de Armagne, Fezenac, Rodez 1333 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jean d'Armagnac I 22 und seine Mutter Béatrice De Clermont Countess Of Charolais 22. Er hat am 4. November 1359 Jeanne de PÉRIGORD geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 26. Mai 1384 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Avignon, Jura, Franche-Comté, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean d'Armagnac II "the Hunchback"   Comte de Armagne, Fezenac, Rodez è nato il nel 1333, il suo padre, Jean d'Armagnac I, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Béatrice De Clermont Countess Of Charolais, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de PÉRIGORD il 4 novembre 1359. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 26 maggio 1384, nel Avignon, Jura, Franche-Comté, Francia, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean d'Armagnac II "the Hunchback"   Comte de Armagne, Fezenac, Rodezが1333年に生まれた時，父Jean d'Armagnac Iは22歳，母Béatrice De Clermont Countess Of Charolaisは22歳であった。1359年11月4日にJeanne de PÉRIGORDと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1384年5月26日にフランスフランチェ-コムトeジュラアヴィグノンで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean d'Armagnac II "the Hunchback"   Comte de Armagne, Fezenac, Rodez(이)가 1333년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jean d'Armagnac I(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Béatrice De Clermont Countess Of Charolais(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1359년 11월 4일 Jeanne de PÉRIGORD(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1384년 5월 26일 프랑스 프랭체-코트e 라 아비뇰에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean d'Armagnac II "the Hunchback"   Comte de Armagne, Fezenac, Rodez nasceu em 1333, seu pai, Jean d'Armagnac I, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Béatrice De Clermont Countess Of Charolais, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de PÉRIGORD em 4 de novembro de 1359. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 26 de maio de 1384, em Avignon, Jura, Franche-Comté, França, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean d'Armagnac II "the Hunchback"   Comte de Armagne, Fezenac, Rodez родился в 1333 г., его отцу по имени Jean d'Armagnac I было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Béatrice De Clermont Countess Of Charolais, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de PÉRIGORD 4 ноября 1359 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 26 мая 1384 г. в местности авигнон, джура, фрэнче-комтe, Франция в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean d'Armagnac II "the Hunchback"   Comte de Armagne, Fezenac, Rodez nació en 1333, su papá, Jean d'Armagnac I, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Béatrice De Clermont Countess Of Charolais, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Jeanne de PÉRIGORD el 4 de noviembre de 1359. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 26 de mayo de 1384, en Avignon, Jura, Franche-Comté, Francia, a la edad de 51 años.
